styling_rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
styling_rules.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
styling_rules.h3: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight text-white

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-8 gap-6 md:gap-8

surfaces.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
surfaces.cards: bg-slate-900/40 border border-white/10 hover:border-orange-500/50 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-orange-400 transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-sm

components.forms: Use Shadcn customized with flat inputs, bg-black/50, border-white/20, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500
components.stepper: Linear progress bar at top of onboarding: bg-white/10 with bg-orange-500 fill

hero.layout: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center relative pt-24
hero.background: dark indoor court image with bg-black/60 overlay and bottom-to-top gradient fade to #0A0A0A
hero.content: Centered. Huge H1: 'CROSS THE POND. DOMINATE THE PAINT.', Subtitle: 'The AI recruitment engine for European basketball players.', CTA: 'Sign In with Google' (orange button with Google icon)

stats_marquee.content: Slow moving ticker using react-fast-marquee: '274 US COLLEGES // 43 EURO-FRIENDLY PROGRAMS // $1.2B SCHOLARSHIPS AVAILABLE'

items.title: AI College Matching
items.desc: Analyzes your stats and playstyle to find the perfect fit.

items.title: AI Email Drafting
items.desc: Write perfect outreach emails to US coaches instantly.

items.title: Response Tracker
items.desc: Know when coaches open your emails.

items.title: Recruitment Score
items.desc: See how ready you are for NCAA D1/D2/D3.

steps: 2. Let AI match you with target programs

onboarding_flow.layout: Split-screen layout. Left side (hidden on mobile): Atmospheric imagery, changing per step, huge typography overlay. Right side: Minimalist Shadcn form container, max-w-md w-full.

steps.title: Basic Info
steps.fields: Name, Primary Position (Select), Secondary Position (Select), Height (Input)

steps.title: Athletic Profile
steps.fields: PPG, APG, RPG (Inputs), Current Team/Club, Highlight Tape URL

steps.title: Academic & Goals
steps.fields: GCSE Grades (Select/Input), A-Level Subjects, Target US Division (NCAA D1, D2, D3, NAIA), Enrolment Year

steps.title: Your First Matches
steps.description: The Aha Moment: Auto-runs AI match with skeleton loader, then reveals 3 matched colleges.

images.description: Empty dark indoor basketball court for hero background and onboarding step 2
Basketball player jumping for dunk, use for onboarding step 1 and step 4
University campus building at dusk, use for onboarding step 3 (Academics)

testing_attributes.guideline: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling.
Install and use lucide-react for icons.
Implement Barlow Condensed via Google Fonts for headings, Manrope for body text.
Build the Landing Page in pure HTML/Tailwind without Shadcn card component wrappers, allowing overlapping and asymmetrical bento grids.
Build the Onboarding Flow forms using customized Shadcn components (strip borders to 1px white/10, bg-transparent).
Ensure the hero background has a max overlay opacity of bg-black/50 or bg-gradient overlay to let the image breathe.
Use the exact media URLs provided in the media section, never use placeholder services.
